title: candollea mucida
intro: Candollea mucida is a plant species native to India, belonging to the family Apocynaceae, and is also known as the 'Indian mistletoe' due to its mistletoe-like habit. The medicinal properties of Candollea mucida include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Candollea mucida is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
